meta.dc:title: Public Law 119–97: To authorize a major medical facility project for the Department of Veterans Affairs for fiscal year 2026 in St. Louis, Missouri, and for other purposes.
meta.dc:creator: National Archives and Records Administration
Office of the Federal Register
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

longTitle.officialTitle:
To authorize a major medical facility project for the Department of Veterans Affairs for fiscal year 2026 in St. Louis, Missouri, and for other purposes.
June 9, 2026
[S. 2393]

enactingFormula.i: Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representa­tives of the United States of America in Congress assembled,

sidenote.p: Fiscal Year 2025 Veterans Affairs Major Medical Facility Authorization Act.

section.heading: SHORT TITLE.
section.content: This Act may be cited as the “Fiscal Year 2025 Veterans Affairs Major Medical Facility Authorization Act”.

section.heading: AUTHORIZATION OF MAJOR MEDICAL FACILITY PROJECT OF DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS AFFAIRS FOR FISCAL YEAR 2026 IN ST. LOUIS, MISSOURI.

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: The Secretary of Veterans Affairs may carry out a major medical facility project in fiscal year 2026 in St. Louis, Missouri, that consists of the construction of a new bed tower, clinical building expansion, consolidated administrative building and warehouse, utility plant, and parking garages, in an amount not to exceed $1,762,668,000.

subsection.heading: Authorization of Appropriations.—
subsection.content: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Veterans Affairs for fiscal year 2026 or the year in which funds are appropriated for the Construction, Major Projects account, $1,762,668,000 for the project authorized in subsection (a).
